[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111101011 7
1 000001111 4
2 010101111 6
3 111100001 5
4 001011001 4
5 000101111 5
6 011111011 7
7 110010011 5

12 21 111101111 8
23 32 010101111 6 match 2
34 43 111101111 8
45 54 111111001 7
56 65 001111111 7
67 76 011111111 8
70 07 111111011 8

02 20 110011111 7
13 31 111101111 8
24 42 111101111 8
35 53 011111111 8
46 64 111101111 8
57 75 011111011 7 match 6
60 06 110111111 8
71 17 111111011 8

03 30 110111111 8
14 41 111101011 7 match 0
25 52 001011111 6
36 63 010101111 6 match 2
47 74 111111011 8
50 05 111011011 7
61 16 111101111 8
72 27 011111111 8

04 40 111110011 7
15 51 111111011 8
26 62 000101111 5 match 5
37 73 011111111 8
